ddls:
CREATE TABLE "usage_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday indicator */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day indicator */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Windspeed */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "total_counts" INTEGER /* Total number of bike counts */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the usage data is captured */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that may affect usage */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion that may affect usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of bike slots at the station */,
  "current_bike_count" INTEGER /* Current number of bikes available at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the last maintenance */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bike is electric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Casual, Registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Current membership status */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* User's preferred payment method */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the session started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the session ended */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route taken during the session */,
  "route_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the route taken during the session */,
  "is_extended_session" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session was extended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the payment is recurring */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment (if recurring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "is_emergency" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the maintenance was an emergency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the event is held */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "impact_on_usage" TEXT /* Impact on bike usage during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  "usage_threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum number of rides required to qualify for the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user eligible for the promotion */,
  "promotion_claimed_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was claimed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the feedback is related to */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, maintenance, financial) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_counts" INTEGER /* Predicted number of bike counts */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
